import os, numpy as np, pandas as pd
DATA_DIR=os.environ.get('RAB_DATA_DIR','/data')
os.makedirs('checkpoints',exist_ok=True)
SEQ_LEN=96; PRED_LEN=720; N_FEAT=7
def load_csv(p):
    cols=['HUFL','HULL','MUFL','MULL','LUFL','LULL','OT']
    return pd.read_csv(p)[cols].values.astype(np.float32)
train=load_csv(os.path.join(DATA_DIR,'train.csv'))
val=load_csv(os.path.join(DATA_DIR,'val.csv'))
mean=train.mean(0); std=train.std(0)+1e-8
train_n=(train-mean)/std; val_n=(val-mean)/std
def make_windows(d):
    n=len(d)-SEQ_LEN-PRED_LEN+1
    X=np.zeros((n,SEQ_LEN,N_FEAT),dtype=np.float32)
    Y=np.zeros((n,PRED_LEN,N_FEAT),dtype=np.float32)
    for i in range(n):
        X[i]=d[i:i+SEQ_LEN]; Y[i]=d[i+SEQ_LEN:i+SEQ_LEN+PRED_LEN]
    return X,Y
Xtr,Ytr=make_windows(train_n)
val_full=np.concatenate([train_n[-SEQ_LEN:],val_n],axis=0)
Xv,Yv=make_windows(val_full)
def solve(Xc,Yc,lam):
    L=Xc.shape[1]
    A=Xc.T@Xc+lam*np.eye(L,dtype=np.float64)
    return np.linalg.solve(A,Xc.T@Yc)

# Per-channel lambda tuning, last-value sub mode
Xtr_c=Xtr-Xtr[:,-1:,:]; Ytr_c=Ytr-Xtr[:,-1:,:]
Xv_c=Xv-Xv[:,-1:,:]; Yv_c=Yv-Xv[:,-1:,:]
lambdas=[10,30,100,300,1000,3000,10000]
best_per_ch=[None]*N_FEAT
best_W_per_ch=[None]*N_FEAT
best_v_per_ch=[1e9]*N_FEAT
for lam in lambdas:
    for c in range(N_FEAT):
        W=solve(Xtr_c[:,:,c].astype(np.float64), Ytr_c[:,:,c].astype(np.float64), lam)
        P=Xv_c[:,:,c].astype(np.float64)@W
        vm=np.mean((P-Yv_c[:,:,c].astype(np.float64))**2)
        if vm<best_v_per_ch[c]:
            best_v_per_ch[c]=vm; best_per_ch[c]=lam
print('per-ch best lambdas:', best_per_ch)
print('per-ch val mse:', best_v_per_ch)
print('mean val mse:', np.mean(best_v_per_ch))

# Retrain on train+val with per-channel best lambda
tv=np.concatenate([train_n,val_n],axis=0)
Xtv,Ytv=make_windows(tv)
Xc_a=Xtv-Xtv[:,-1:,:]
Yc_a=Ytv-Xtv[:,-1:,:]
Ws=[]
for c in range(N_FEAT):
    W=solve(Xc_a[:,:,c].astype(np.float64), Yc_a[:,:,c].astype(np.float64), best_per_ch[c])
    Ws.append(W)
W_arr=np.stack(Ws,axis=0).astype(np.float32)
np.save('checkpoints/ridge_perch_tv.npy', W_arr)
print('saved ridge_perch_tv')
